response:
TEMPERATURE IS THE MEASURE OF HEAT IN A SYSTEM.
SUNLIGHT SHINES STRONGLY ON THE SURFACE OF THE EARTH.
SEASONS SHIFT AS THE SUN SITS HIGH OR LOW.
SUMMER BRINGS SWELLING WARMTH TO SOIL AND SKY.
SNOW STOPS WHEN SPRING STARTS TO STIR THE SNOW.
STORMS SWEEP ACROSS THE SKY WITH SPEED AND SOUND.
SAND SHIFTS AS THE SEA SURGES AGAINST THE SHORE.
STARS SHINE BRIGHTLY WHEN THE SUN SETS SLOWLY.
STILLNESS SETS IN AS THE NIGHT SPREADS SOFTLY.
STEAM RISES FROM THE SEA AS THE SUN SHINES.
STARS SPIN SLOWLY IN THE SKY ABOVE US.
ROLL THE DICE TO SEE IF THE ROLL IS RIGHT.
